title: Major Milestone: 56+ Professional Developer Tools!
description: Celebrating another huge milestone! We have now reached 56+ specialized, fully offline, privacy-first developer utilities. Check out our brand-new tools for visual Markdown table generation, Text-to-Speech playback, HTML/XML beautification, Text-to-Binary translations, and bidirectional JSON-to-XML conversion!

title: Markdown Table Generator & Editor
description: Design and edit beautifully aligned Markdown, HTML, and CSV tables with an interactive, visual grid editor. Supports row/column management and alignment toggles 100% locally.

title: Text to Speech Reader
description: Read any text aloud with custom speeds, pitches, and local system voice options using your browser's native offline Web Speech Synthesis engine. Perfect for content review and accessibility.

title: HTML & XML Formatter
description: Beautify cluttered HTML or XML markup elements with customized spaces or tabs, or use high-efficiency minification to compress pages and increase speed.

title: Text ↔ Binary Translator
description: Convert plain text to standard binary bytes, hexadecimal numbers, or ASCII decimal strings and vice-versa in real-time with customizable dividers.

title: JSON ↔ XML Converter
description: Transform structured JSON schemas to beautiful XML hierarchies, or convert XML tags back into clean JSON objects 100% locally and safely in your browser.

title: Major Milestone: 51+ Professional Developer Tools!
description: Celebrating a massive update! We have officially crossed the milestone of hosting 51+ specialized premium, browser-native tools with zero API trackers. Enjoy the moment with our brand-new expanded tool suites!

title: YAML ↔ JSON Bidirectional Converter
description: Convert complex hierarchical YAML configuration text files to highly nested JSON objects or JSON payloads back to pristine, neat YAML DevOps templates with live validation.

title: WCAG Color Contrast Checker & Palettes
description: Calculate foreground and background relative luminance to ensure official WCAG AA/AAA design compliance, and automatically build visual monochromatic, analogous, and complementary palettes.

title: Bulk UUID & GUID Generator
description: Generate high-entropy, cryptographically secure Version 4 RFC-compliant unique IDs in bulk. Fine-tune dividers, brackets, or uppercase styling and download offline logs.

title: CSS Beautifier & Minifier Tool
description: Beautify messy stylesheets with customized indentation rules, or compress raw files into neat, high-compression minified stylesheets to optimize loading speed.

title: User Agent Parser & Client Info Analyzer
description: Extract hardware/GPU layouts, operating systems, browser specs, viewport dimensions, color spaces, and orientation statuses securely and fully locally.

title: Unix Timestamp Converter
description: Convert seconds and milliseconds Epoch timestamps to human-readable dates and back. Features timezone adapters and an active ticking epoch clock.

title: Binary / Hex / Octal Converter
description: Convert standard ASCII text arrays to binary, hexadecimal, octal and decimal notations. Includes structured binary-bit breakdown tables in real-time.

title: Code Type Def & Schema Converter
description: Translate raw JSON query payloads into structured TypeScript interfaces, Go structs, SQL tables patterns, or JSON schemas fully in-browser.

title: String Escaper / Unescaper
description: Escape and unescape raw quotes, slashes, and syntax tokens cleanly to safely inject into programming scripts, JSON fields, or SQL queries.

title: Cryptographic Hash Generator
description: Generate safe local MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, or SHA-512 checksum digests of files or custom text lines with live match verification.

title: Major Milestone: 41+ Developer Tools!
description: Huge library expansion! We have officially crossed the milestones of hosting 41+ specialized browser-native utilities. Added 5 advanced developer tools including a local JWT decoder, CSV parser, and Regex visualizer.

title: Local JWT Decoder & Debugger
description: Decode, inspect, and validate JSON Web Tokens (JWT) safely in real-time. Analyze cryptographic headers and payload claims with complete local privacy.

title: CSV Formatter & Column Extractor
description: Clean, format, and filter CSV data seamlessly in your browser. Extract individual columns, sort records, remove duplicate rows, and convert tabular data to JSON, Markdown tables, or SQL inserts.

title: Interactive Regex Tester & Visual Matcher
description: Compose and validate regular expressions online with dynamic, color-coded visual match highlighting, capturing groups, subset views, and pre-built common validation presets.

title: Visual Cron Expression Builder
description: Build standardized crontab cron expressions using our visual sliders and configuration options. Read schedules translated into clear, simple English and preview upcoming runtime ranges.

title: SEO Meta Tag Generator & Previewer
description: Generate optimized SEO meta tags, Facebook Open Graph, and Twitter Card metadata. Inspect actual Google or Facebook visual card preview mockups instantly.

title: QR Code Generator Launched
description: Produce SaaS-grade customized QR codes instantly for text, URLs, emails, phone numbers, and WiFi networks with styling, color settings, and PNG/vector SVG client-side local downloads.

title: Interactive JSON Formatter
description: Format, beautify, validate, and inspect your JSON data with our collapsable tree inspector and live syntax validation alerts.

title: High-Compression JSON Minifier
description: Compress and minify complex JSON blobs into lightweight, single-line payloads while maintaining structural compliance.

title: Markdown to HTML Converter
description: Render GFM Markdown text structures instantly into clean semantic HTML tags. Includes side-by-side live rendering canvas and clean CSS copy modes.

title: HTML to Markdown Converter
description: Deconstruct or reverse-translate raw nested HTML tag containers back into standardized and clean Markdown styling structures locally in your browser.

title: Interactive Notification Upgrades
description: Overhauled the notification center with dynamic micro-interactions, an active ring indicator, brand-new responsive icon animation layers, and seamless list transitions.

title: Case Converter Pro Launched
description: Convert text between 13 different casings including camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, dot.case, path/case and CONSTANT_CASE with live preview cards.

title: Added Bullet Point Generator
description: Convert blocks of paragraphs, notes, or essays into organized lists. Supports circular, square, standard bullet symbols, or arrows.

title: Added Remove Emojis Tool
description: Instantly purge Unicode emojis and flags from social media posts, messages, and document copy while preserving text spaces.

title: Added Remove Special Characters
description: Strip heavy symbols, equations, and punctuation from strings while keeping digits and raw letters securely locally.

title: Added Paragraph Formatter
description: Convert messy AI walls of text or ChatGPT clipboard content into neat, readable paragraphs with standard indents.

title: Added Random Text Generator
description: Generate dynamic words, sentences, and paragraphs styled for corporate, marketing, conversational or placeholder needs.

title: Added Lorem Ipsum Generator
description: Generate highly customizable placeholder Latin dummy text segments instantly for layout, prototyping, and copywriting.

title: Added Remove Empty Lines
description: Prune blank lines, whitespace spacers, and redundant carriage spaces instantly in our offline formatter.

title: Added Text Repeater
description: Repeat lines, words, phrases, or custom templates instantly inside direct client-side memory fields.

title: Added Sentence Counter
description: Calculate sentence totals, words, characters, and estimate reading pacing instantly inside a 100% private sandbox.

title: Added Grammar Checker
description: Audit punctuation, common spelling issues, and enhance general readability using a 100% secure offline parser.

title: Added Keyword Density Checker
description: Measure keyword distribution and density percentages for SEO web copywriting in real-time.

title: Optimized Core SEO Setup
description: Deeply optimized metadata tag rendering, JSON-LD schemas, and index paths across all 20 text utility pages.

title: Enhanced Mobile Experience
description: Rebuilt fluid grids, oversized touch selections, and typography hierarchies for a native feels on all handheld devices.
